message:
feat(fp-columnar): add Column nlargest/nsmallest parity (frankenpandas-vkdg)

Adds the two companions to sort_values that match pd.Series.nlargest(n)
and nsmallest(n). Both delegate to the stable sort_values path:
nlargest takes the head of the descending sort, nsmallest the head of
the ascending sort. Because sort_values places missing values at the
end, the top-n / bottom-n views naturally exclude nulls unless n
exceeds the non-missing count. n > len() clamps; n = 0 yields an
empty same-dtype column.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
